creator: jumper99@gmx.de
text:
As a successor of http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/142192, net-snmp55 is still/also broken:

# snmpwalk -v2c -cpublic localhost .1.3.6.1.4.1.2021.4.15
UCD-SNMP-MIB::memCached.0 = INTEGER: -4194304 kB
# snmpwalk -v2c -cpublic bsdhelmut .1.3.6.1.4.1.2021.4.15
UCD-SNMP-MIB::memCached.0 = INTEGER: -232332096 kB
# snmpd -v

NET-SNMP version:  5.5
Web:               http://www.net-snmp.org/
Email:             net-snmp-coders@lists.sourceforge.net

#
